title: MANGA Kaworu and Sex Roles split
display_title: MANGA Kaworu and Sex Roles split
wikitext:
[]: [MANGA] Kaworu & Sex Roles [split]             Quote Post by Synapsid » Tue Apr 14, 2009 7:31 pm [ Split from here .] Oedipusfoot wrote: Things are getting weird around here...but anyway: Manga Kaworu ( non-Reichu variant),

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 15, 2009 12:39 pm Synapsid: Just to clarify Fem-Kaworu would be a reverse trap; that's what makes her fun. >=3 Anyway, topic.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Apr 15, 2009 1:19 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Synapsid: Just to clarify Fem-Kaworu would be a reverse trap; that's what makes her fun. >=3

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 15, 2009 1:41 pm NemZ wrote: Reverse trap is a silly term

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Apr 15, 2009 2:01 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: DFC

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 15, 2009 2:21 pm NemZ wrote: decidedly flat chest?

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Wed Apr 15, 2009 3:51 pm Synapsid wrote: I don't think Reichu ever bothered with Manga Kaworu. Besides given his soap opera reenactments it's clear that he identifies with a male role...*That said I doubt he's good for a stable Relationship.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Wed Apr 15, 2009 7:48 pm @Sailor Star Dust I just don't really like the Reverse-trap/trap distinction; it's still a trap and reverse just caries weird connotations. @chazthesilencer Aw, thanks I'll keep it... @Oedipusfoot;girls-room_2.gif Oops, I almost forgot about Rei-chuu's classic...No mater Manga Kaworu is still the more masculine of the Kaworu's. Oedipusfoot wrote: so do you mind--oh wait, this isn't on topic. Darn.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Wed Apr 15, 2009 10:31 pm Synapsid wrote: Kaworu watches some generic romance flick,and that night he tries to "comfort" Shinji by reenacting the male role he observed.[/url] (Shinji doesn't take Kaworu's attempt at intimate support to well, and

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Wed Apr 15, 2009 10:56 pm I never did say anime Shinji is gay it's ambiguous; he clearly is attracted to women, but with all the physical and verbal ques in 24 it's clear he's attracted Kaworu. Also you've got material like the Shinji Raising project that depicts him as bi: he's got some sort of flexible Kinsey scale in the game... Never mind the Keikaku manga where he actualy gets aroused from the blatantly gay version of Kaworu molesting him. ...some past "connection" he had with Rei via the Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 15, 2009 11:35 pm Oedipusfoot wrote: Remember this? I hate spreading it around since it should burn but

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Wed Apr 15, 2009 11:40 pm does kaworu have to pee since he doesnt need to eat? /fanwank

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Thu Apr 16, 2009 12:01 am Synapsid wrote: I never did say anime Shinji is gay it's ambiguous; he clearly is attracted to women, but with all the physical and verbal ques in 24 it's clear he's attracted Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Apr 16, 2009 1:24 am Synapsid wrote: I just don't really like the Reverse-trap/trap distinction;

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Thu Apr 16, 2009 6:51 am I don't have synapsid's gift for words so... Synapsid wrote: While at a "sleepover" (After KFRei) [URL=http://s528.photobucket.com/albums/dd325/Synapsidia/EVA/?action=view&current=088.jpg] [/URL] Kaworu watches some generic romance flick,and that night he tries to "comfort" Shinji (who's having a panic attack) by reenacting the male role he observed. (Shinji doesn't take Kaworu's attempt at intimate support to well, and Kaworu's excessively direct attempt at romance fails.Partly because this version of Shinji has a heterosexual identity By Manga Kaworu's actions that involve mirroring of the observed male role, we can see that he perceives himself as one...This stands in contrast to Anime Kaworu's more subtle and "maternal" behavior.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Thu Apr 16, 2009 11:17 am @Alaska Slim I never read a statement where Anno explicitly states Kaworu isn't gay, he tends to leave all these things ambiguous and up to individual interpretation. And you might not like the manga or spinoff games but seeing as how Anno hasn't denounced them they aren't worthless for our intents...As for Anime Shinji it's rather clear he was attracted to Kaworu, people act around others like he did when they are attracted the subject: Going beet red, stuttering on questions like beding with him, while trying to sneak looks at the crush basicaly fals into the definition of smitten. (although it's sort of stereotyped as a feminine way of acting, it fits right into Shinji'ss Uke-ness) Mr. Tines wrote: The distinction is between "I wish I hadn't hit it." and "Damn, I should have hit it!"

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Apr 16, 2009 11:37 am Why the hell is an actual discussion springing up in this pointless thread? This seems to be getting split-worthy... it's detracting from the goofiness. As for Kaworu, I believe his anime incarnation was not gay so much as an omnisexual tourist simply enjoying whatever experiences life brought him. His comments about love and emotional frailty were directed towards humanity as a species, not Shinji in particular. Manga Kaworu was definately more specific in his pursuits, overwhelmed by and likely even jealous of the emotions he felt secondhand from Rei 2.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Thu Apr 16, 2009 3:13 pm @ NemZ: Wow. That was really said well. Synapsid wrote: Now anime Shinji is practically a prototypical version of Yandere...and not just with Asuka; he also freaked out when Kaworu "betrayed" him, enougth so that he went into something of an emotional breakdown...

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Thu Apr 16, 2009 4:21 pm Oedipusfoot wrote: Hah. And forgave him.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Thu Apr 16, 2009 4:43 pm Synapsid wrote: Given all M-Kaworu's talk about becoming one with Shinji and his attempts at intimacy it seems that he really did gain all of Manga Rei's desire for Shinji...

 up in this pointless thread? This seems to be getting split-worthy... it's detracting from the goofiness. As for Kaworu, I believe his anime incarnation was not gay so much as an omnisexual tourist simply enjoying whatever experiences life brought him. His comments about love and emotional frailty were directed towards humanity as a species, not Shinji in particular. Manga Kaworu was definately more specific in his pursuits, overwhelmed by and likely even jealous of the emotions he felt secondhand from Rei 2.
